title: plantago stenophylla
intro: Plantago stenophylla is a species of plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae), commonly known as narrow-leaved plantain, native to Australia and New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Plantago stenophylla are attributed to its high mucilage content, which provides anti-inflammatory and soothing effects on the skin and mucous membranes. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, and has been found to exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Plantago stenophylla include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
